label: Locale by ACHIEVEMOR v2 — Locale Frontend
description: Next-gen Locale frontend with ACHIEVEMOR brand integration. Consumer-facing UI for the LUC calculation engine. This repo is the UI layer — LUC-Locale-Universal-Calculator is the authoritative engine.

chatIcon.rule: ACHEEVY Helmet is the ONLY primary chat avatar. Locale surfaces show ACHEEVY with ACHIEVEMOR branding.

context.relationship: Locale v2 is the consumer UI. LUC is the engine. No duplicate calculation logic here — this repo renders results from LUC.
context.achievemor: ACHIEVEMOR is the brand umbrella. Locale v2 carries ACHIEVEMOR visual identity while using ACHEEVY as the narrator.
